problem id: 50a0c4b6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(2) OR NOT SHR(1)

examples:
  00011100 -> 11110111
  00111001 -> 11101111
  11010101 -> 10110101
  01100000 -> 11011111
  01110010 -> 11011110
  00011001 -> 11110111
  01000011 -> 11011110
  00011000 -> 11110111

query: 11000110
predicted answer: 10111101
